---
title: "Depth by Poisson — diploid only (3-state)"
author: "Robert Reid"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexmix)
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
theme_set(theme_bw())
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Read and preprocess SNP data for depth

```{r}
#read_path = "~/Dropbox/__Work/__Lab-Notebook/2025/00 RAD5-OE-consolidated/Read Analysis/read_data_chromosome/RAD5_01/full.csv.gz"
read_path = "~/Dropbox/__Work/__Lab-Notebook/2025/00 RAD5-OE-consolidated/Read Analysis/read_data_chromosome/RAD5_06/RAD5_6.csv.gz"

read_data = fread(read_path)

SNP_data = fread(
      "SNPs.vcf.gz",
      sep       = "\t",
      skip      = "#",
      col.names = c("chrom", "pos", "ID", "REF", "ALT",
                    "QUAL", "FILTER", "INFO", "FORMAT", "DET")
    )

SNP_data = SNP_data[nchar(REF) == 1 & nchar(ALT) == 1,
             .(chrom, pos = as.integer(pos), REF, ALT, QUAL)]

combined = read_data |>
  left_join(SNP_data) |>
  select(chrom, pos, read_id, call, is_del, is_refskip,
         base_qual, mapq, REF, ALT, QUAL) |>
  mutate(allele = case_when(
    call == REF ~ "REF",
    call == ALT ~ "ALT",
    .default = "OTHER"
  ),
  IS_REF = allele == "REF")

summary_balance <- combined[, .(
  n_ref   = sum(IS_REF, na.rm = TRUE),
  n_total = .N,
  n_alt   = .N - sum(IS_REF, na.rm = TRUE),
  balance = sum(IS_REF, na.rm = TRUE) / .N
), by = .(chrom, pos)]

min_depth = median(summary_balance$n_total) - (3 * IQR(summary_balance$n_total))
summary_balance <- summary_balance[n_total >= min_depth]

hist(summary_balance$balance, breaks = 100)
```

```{r}
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3-STATE DIPLOID MODEL: HOM_REF | DIP_HET_0.5 | HOM_ALT
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------

dbinom_err <- function(k, N, p) {
  dbinom(k, N, pmax(pmin(p, 1 - 1e-9), 1e-9))
}

dbetabinom <- function(k, N, mu, theta) {
  alpha <- mu * theta
  beta  <- (1 - mu) * theta
  out   <- exp(lchoose(N, k) + lbeta(k + alpha, N - k + beta) - lbeta(alpha, beta))
  out[!is.finite(out)] <- 0
  out
}

.wll_theta <- function(theta, k, N, mu, w) {
  ll <- dbetabinom(k, N, mu, theta)
  ll[ll <= 0] <- 1e-300
  sum(w * log(ll))
}

fit_ab_mixture <- function(k, N,
                           theta_init = 80,
                           eps_init   = 0.02,
                           max_iter   = 200,
                           tol        = 1e-5) {
  labels <- c("HOM_REF", "DIP_HET_0.5", "HOM_ALT")

  pi    <- rep(1/3, 3)
  eps   <- eps_init
  theta <- theta_init
  r     <- matrix(0, length(k), 3)

  message("Starting EM...")
  for (iter in seq_len(max_iter)) {
    old <- c(pi, eps, theta)

    # ---- E-step ----
    r[, 1] <- pi[1] * dbinom_err(k, N, eps)
    r[, 2] <- pi[2] * dbetabinom(k, N, 0.5, theta)
    r[, 3] <- pi[3] * dbinom_err(k, N, 1 - eps)

    rs <- rowSums(r); rs[rs == 0] <- 1e-300
    r  <- r / rs

    # ---- M-step ----
    pi <- colMeans(r)

    w_ref <- r[, 1]; w_alt <- r[, 3]
    num   <- sum(w_ref * k / N) + sum(w_alt * (1 - k / N))
    den   <- sum(w_ref) + sum(w_alt)
    if (den > 0) eps <- pmax(pmin(num / den, 0.15), 1e-4)

    wj <- r[, 2]
    if (sum(wj) >= 1)
      theta <- optimize(.wll_theta, c(5, 5000),
                        k = k, N = N, mu = 0.5, w = wj,
                        maximum = TRUE)$maximum

    if (max(abs(c(pi, eps, theta) - old) / (abs(old) + 1)) < tol) {
      message("Converged after ", iter, " iterations.")
      break
    }
  }

  list(
    mixing_proportions = setNames(pi, labels),
    error_rate         = eps,
    theta              = theta,
    posterior          = `colnames<-`(r, labels),
    assignments        = labels[max.col(r)]
  )
}
```

```{r}
viterbi_segment <- function(k, N, chrom,
                             fit,
                             trans_stay = 0.999) {
  n_states  <- 3
  trans_off <- (1 - trans_stay) / (n_states - 1)
  A_log     <- matrix(log(trans_off), n_states, n_states)
  diag(A_log) <- log(trans_stay)

  eps    <- fit$error_rate
  theta  <- fit$theta
  labels <- names(fit$mixing_proportions)

  log_emit      <- matrix(0, length(k), n_states)
  log_emit[, 1] <- log(pmax(dbinom_err(k, N, eps),          1e-300))
  log_emit[, 2] <- log(pmax(dbetabinom(k, N, 0.5, theta),   1e-300))
  log_emit[, 3] <- log(pmax(dbinom_err(k, N, 1 - eps),      1e-300))

  log_pi      <- log(fit$mixing_proportions)
  assignments <- character(length(k))

  for (chr in unique(chrom)) {
    idx <- which(chrom == chr)
    T_  <- length(idx)
    E   <- log_emit[idx, , drop = FALSE]

    delta      <- matrix(-Inf, T_, n_states)
    psi        <- matrix(0L,   T_, n_states)
    delta[1, ] <- log_pi + E[1, ]

    for (t in 2:T_) {
      scores     <- matrix(delta[t - 1, ], n_states, n_states) + A_log
      psi[t, ]   <- apply(scores, 2, which.max)
      delta[t, ] <- apply(scores, 2, max) + E[t, ]
    }

    path     <- integer(T_)
    path[T_] <- which.max(delta[T_, ])
    for (t in (T_ - 1):1)
      path[t] <- psi[t + 1, path[t + 1]]

    assignments[idx] <- labels[path]
  }

  assignments
}
```

```{r}
results <- fit_ab_mixture(k = summary_balance$n_alt, N = summary_balance$n_total)

cat("Mixing proportions:\n");  print(round(results$mixing_proportions, 3))
cat("\nEstimated error rate:", round(results$error_rate, 4), "\n")
cat("\nTheta (DIP_HET_0.5):", round(results$theta, 1), "\n")

summary_balance_model <- bind_cols(summary_balance, assignments = results$assignments)

summary_balance_model |>
  filter(chrom == "S288C_chrXI") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = pos / 1000, y = factor(assignments))) +
  geom_point()
```

```{r}
hmm_levels <- c("HOM_REF", "DIP_HET_0.5", "HOM_ALT")

summary_balance_model$hmm_state <- viterbi_segment(
  k     = summary_balance_model$n_alt,
  N     = summary_balance_model$n_total,
  chrom = summary_balance_model$chrom,
  fit   = results
)

summary_balance_model |>
  ggplot(aes(x = pos / 1000, y = 1,
             color = factor(hmm_state, levels = hmm_levels))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 0.8) +
  facet_grid(chrom ~ .) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "turbo", begin = 0.2, end = 0.9) +
  labs(x = "Position (kb)", y = NULL, title = "Viterbi segmentation — diploid model")
```
